title: Add governed pack registry and runtime manifest contracts
summary: Defines the core-owned registry, schemas, typed models, and validator hooks for host-pack integration.
scope_items: Add core-owned pack registry and pack runtime manifest artifacts and schemas.
Extend typed pack-contract models and loader accessors for the new governed surfaces.
done_when_items: Pack registry and runtime manifest surfaces validate through reusable-core validation.
Core exposes typed load helpers without direct pack imports.
